level.title: Talk to Your Minion
level.subdescription: Your Minion just arrived. They are eager, willing, and understand absolutely nothing. The quality of their response depends entirely on the quality of your order. Learn to give precise, structured prompts and watch your Minion transform from confused to capable.

mission_targets: Apply core prompt engineering principles such as role, context, task, format, and constraints to write more effective AI prompts

mission_gear.name: Prompt Engineering
mission_gear.definition: The skill of writing clear, structured instructions that guide an AI to produce the exact output you need.
mission_gear.theme_translation: A Minion with vague orders runs around doing nothing useful. A Minion with precise orders executes perfectly. Same Minion. The difference is how you talk to them.
why_useful: Better prompts produce dramatically better outputs
Works with any AI tool you will ever use
The foundation for everything else in this session
Takes seconds to apply but changes everything about the result

mission_check: Ran the vague prompt and saw the generic output
Ran the structured prompt and compared the two outputs
Ran the Role layer prompt and saw the difference
Ran the Context layer prompt and saw the difference
Ran the Task layer prompt and saw the difference
Ran the Format layer prompt and saw the difference
Ran the Constraints layer prompt and saw the final result
